event: Pastoral Landscape with Cattle by a Stream
description: A serene landscape showing a calm river or stream winding through lush green terrain. Large leafy trees dominate the right side, their branches spreading wide. Cattle graze on a sunlit grassy bank beside the water. In the distance, blue-green mountains rise beneath a sky of soft clouds tinted gold and blue. The light is warm and golden, suggesting late afternoon. The overall scene is one of abundant, undisturbed nature.
